note: Scaffold stub for the ELEANOR-DAVID governance variant -- the ELEANOR layer that sits on top of DAVID's Llama 3.1 8B language product. Inherits the base ELEANOR architecture from AI/ELEANOR (the five intrinsic subagents Memory/Deliberation/Voice/Planner/Watcher); adds DAVID-product-specific governance/compliance. Variant corpus shards go in training/eleanor_dataset/ -- do NOT copy the base ELEANOR corpus here.

dataset.corpus_shards_note: Variant-specific shards only (eleanor_david_*_corpus.jsonl in training/eleanor_dataset/). Empty until the variant corpus is authored.

model.hf_note: Requires HUGGING_FACE_HUB_TOKEN and Meta Llama 3.1 approval at huggingface.co/meta-llama/Llama-3.1-8B-Instruct

dry_run.note: Scaffold: no corpus yet. Author variant shards, build, then inspect config + stub output before any RunPod GPU spend.
